summary: Backend API testing for Unified Picks Vault 100/100 enhancements completed. All 11 tests passed. Verified: 1) Smart badges (seasonal, trending, new) working correctly - 19/44 picks have badges, 2) Seasonal context detection working (valentine's season detected), 3) API /api/mira/os/understand-with-products returns ui_action.type='open_picks_vault', 4) Frontend code inspection confirmed all 100/100 mobile-first features present.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ UnifiedPicksVault.jsx (1147 lines) - Full 100/100 implementation with all mobile-first features
✓ TopPicksPanel.jsx (537 lines) - Enhanced with haptic and touch improvements
✓ haptic.js (267 lines) - Cross-platform haptic feedback utility
✓ top_picks_routes.py (447 lines) - Smart badges generation working correctly
✓ Seasonal badge detection working - Valentine's Day season detected in January
✓ All picks have valid 'badges' array structure
✓ Concierge suggestion cards correctly have price=null

success_rate.frontend: Not tested (backend-only testing requested, frontend code inspection verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Picks Vault 100/100 enhancement testing complete. All backend APIs working. Smart badges (seasonal, trending, new, birthday, reorder) implemented. Valentine's Day seasonal context is currently active. Frontend code has been verified via code inspection for: haptic feedback (imports and usage in both components), 44px touch targets (w-11 h-11, min-h-[44px]), iOS safe area (env(safe-area-inset-bottom)), swipe-to-close (framer-motion drag), scroll snap (snap-x, snap-start classes), keyboard escape handler, skeleton loading, select all/deselect, animated badges with pulse, enhanced tooltips with multiple reasons, long press quick actions, pull to refresh.

backend_apis: POST /api/mira/os/understand-with-products - 'Show me personalized picks for [Pet]' returns ui_action.type='open_picks_vault'
GET /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_id} - Returns 44 picks across 11 pillars with smart badges
GET /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_id}/pillar/{pillar} - Returns pillar-specific picks with badges

smart_badges_verified.note: Birthday, trending, new, reorder badges will appear based on data conditions (pet birthday, product popularity, creation date, purchase history)

UnifiedPicksVault.jsx.select_all_deselect: Lines 546-557: selectAll function, Lines 539-543: clearSelection function
UnifiedPicksVault.jsx.animated_badges: Lines 90-117: AnimatedBadge component with pulse animation
UnifiedPicksVault.jsx.enhanced_tooltips: Lines 120-177: WhyThisPickTooltip with multiple reasons based on badges
UnifiedPicksVault.jsx.pull_to_refresh: Lines 615-623: fetchPersonalizedPicks(true) with refresh indicator at lines 940-945
